title: Agency Information Collection Activities; Submission for OMB Review; Comment Request
abstract: In accordance with the requirements of the Paperwork Reduction Act of 1995 (PRA), the OCC, the Board, and the FDIC (the agencies) may not conduct or sponsor, and a respondent is not required to respond to, an information collection unless it displays a currently valid Office of Management and Budget (OMB) control number. On September 28, 2023, and on December 27, 2023, the agencies, under the auspices of the federal Financial Institutions Examination Council (FFIEC), requested public comment for
action: Joint notice and request for comment.
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
